messages.subject: PDF export crashes on macOS 14
messages.summary: Repro: open any note with embedded images, File > Export > PDF, app freezes for ~15s then crashes.
messages.content:
<email>Hi,

Love the app. PDF export is reliably crashing for me on the macOS desktop build.

Repro:
  1. Open any note with at least one embedded image.
  2. File > Export > PDF.
  3. App freezes for ~15s, then crashes silently. No dialog.

macOS 14.4, Drafto 1.4.2 (build 1234).

Thanks,
Alex</email>
